CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA Y. CHEN'S "Motion For Entry Of Judgment."
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. The voluntary dismissal is vacated. Judgment to be entered for defendant Christina Chen. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/DS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STEVEN HO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER ADDRESSED WHAT WAS ESSENTALLY A FAMILY CASE TO BE RESOLVED BY THE FAMILLY LAW DEPARTMENT. EACH PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A SEPARATE PROPOSED ORDER. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CHEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WAS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE IT IS A PROFESSIONAL MALPRACTICE ACTION WHICH CANNOT BE BROUGHT ON THESE FACTS AND CANNOT BE BROUGHT BY NON-PARTIES. EACH PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A SEPARATE PROPOSED ORDER. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons On Frannie Mok-Wang;Declaration
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Darren Wong, Esq., of Wong & Associates, 451-2124, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Baron J. Drexel, Esq., (510) 444-3184, for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
Attorney Drexel represented to the Court that he will accept service for his client. The Court ordered Defendant Frannie Mok-Wang's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons off calendar. Defendant has 10 days leave to file responsive pleadings. Notice waived. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons On Frannie Mok-Wang;Declaration
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To May-31-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FRANNIE MOK-WANG'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons was continued to May 31, 2006. Elaine Erdman, Samson Lei and Frances Mok-Wang are to appear in Court at 10:30 am to testify under oath and subject to cross examination. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
